---
title: "Hi, I'm Ashley!"
subtitle: Welcome to my academic portfolio, showcasing case studies and site analytics over the course of 20 months.
---

::::: columns
::: {.column width="40%"}
![](images/ashley-headshot.jpg){style="border-radius: 70%;"}
:::

::: {.column width="70%" style="padding-left: 3rem;"}
## About Me

I am currently supporting marketing procurement at Microsoft, and was previously at The Walt Disney Company. At Disney, my work has helped bring landmark campaigns to life — including ESPN and Disney's first-ever Super Bowl marketing campaign, *"[We're Going](https://thewaltdisneycompany.com/news/were-going-super-bowl-espn/),"* and Hulu's comedy-first brand moment, *"[Hularious.](https://thewaltdisneycompany.com/news/hularious-stand-up-comedy-hulu/)"*

Outside of work & school, I enjoy trying new restaurants around Southern California, traveling, and making my daily matcha drink!
:::
:::::

## Academic Overview

- I hold a Bachelor's in Business Administration from the University of California, Riverside with a concentration in Marketing in December '22.

- In August '24, I decided to pursue my Master's in Digital Marketing at Cal Poly Pomona as a part-time student and am enrolled in a 2-year program. My expected graduation is June '26 with program completion in August of that year.

- This site encompasses prior projects and case studies conducted over the course of the MSDM program, including a year-long capstone project with the [Trauma Resource Institute](https://www.traumaresourceinstitute.com/).

*Let's connect on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ashleyxlee/)!*
